state.next-action: `12-02` is now in motion: Grime Time staff admins are recognized from the mapped Clerk org `org_3BmXmwG7NpGNO1JKpE3MkR667Mm`, the public-shell operator toolbar now exposes `Ops`, `CRM workspace`, `Docs`, `Customer portal`, and a Payload-admin bridge, `/admin/login` redirects signed-in Clerk users into the bridge instead of stranding them on a second login screen, impersonation routes now respect membership-based admin access, and homepage media can be replaced or regenerated in place from hover controls on tracked images. Next slice is the rest of `12-02`: build durable admin/workspace controls to assign memberships, promote or demote role templates, and lock or unlock entitlements from Grime Time itself, while `11-05` still retains the remaining Supabase-retirement and Stripe-customer-id linkage cleanup.
